_note: Model routing policy for dataset generation. Generator and judge NEVER the same model for the same task.

dev_tier.note: Qwen3-235b-a22b MoE model for generation; DeepSeek V3 (0324) for cross-model judgment

eval_tier.note: Eval-tier only for sealed held_out scoring — Days 4-6 only

preference_leakage_check: Assert generator_model != judge_model for every (task_id, generation_run) pair before committing to dataset
